history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle selfie of a young man with dark, messy hair wearing a black hoodie. He is inside a car, with the back of a car seat visible behind him. The lighting is somewhat dim and natural, coming from the front and slightly to the side, casting soft shadows on his face. His expression is neutral, with his lips slightly pursed. The hoodie has a drawstring and two metal grommets on the hood. The background is blurred, showing the interior of a car and a hint of the outside through the window, which appears overcast. The color palette is dominated by dark tones of the hoodie and car interior, contrasted with the lighter tones of his skin and the overcast sky. The overall mood is casual and introspective.
